top_5_cases.headline: Massive Hotel Overcharge / Falsified Billing
top_5_cases.full_reasoning: The invoice bills 17,900 SAR for Kimpton Vividora Barcelona (6300 + 2650 per person). However, the email explicitly states the hotel cost is 2760 SAR for 3 rooms. This is a severe overcharge and potential fraud.
top_5_cases.recommended_action: Reject the invoice rows, demand a refund for the overcharged amount, and investigate the agency's billing practices.

top_5_cases.headline: Duplicate Billing / Rebooking Fraud
top_5_cases.full_reasoning: Two tickets were issued for Ibrahim Mohammad Abu Abed for the exact same route (JED EAM JED) and dates (05MAY-06MAY), but with different amounts (1830 SAR and 1735 SAR). This indicates potential refund arbitrage or duplicate billing.
top_5_cases.recommended_action: Reject the duplicate ticket, verify if one was refunded, and audit the agency for rebooking fraud.

top_5_cases.headline: Unapproved High-Value International Ticket
top_5_cases.full_reasoning: A ticket for ALBASIRI/SALEH MR (RUH CDG ZYR) was billed at 19,500 SAR with no matching approval email. The amount is exceptionally high and VAT is 0%, suggesting a potential sponsorship misclassification or unauthorized travel.
top_5_cases.recommended_action: Reject the invoice row, require explicit management approval, and verify the business purpose of the trip.

top_5_cases.headline: Unapproved Family Travel
top_5_cases.full_reasoning: Tickets for family members (SALEH/MARIAM, SALEH/FARAH, SALEH/EKREMA) were billed at exact round numbers (2690, 3330, 2690) with 0% VAT and no approval emails. This appears to be personal travel improperly billed to the company.
top_5_cases.recommended_action: Reject the invoice rows, confirm if this is an approved expat annual ticket, and ensure it is deducted from the employee's allowance if applicable.

top_5_cases.headline: Suspiciously Frequent Travel on Same Route
top_5_cases.full_reasoning: Farhan Modhsher Alenazy has two round trips to Tabuk (RUH TUU RUH) within 2 days (May 3 and May 5), both at high amounts (2800 SAR and 2250 SAR). While both have approvals, the frequency and cost are highly anomalous.
top_5_cases.recommended_action: Flag for manager review to confirm the business necessity of back-to-back trips to the same destination and investigate the high fares.

key_themes: Massive overcharging on international hotel bookings
Duplicate billing and potential refund arbitrage on domestic flights
Unapproved family travel billed to the company
Missing approval emails for several domestic flights and train tickets
